sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34028" key="e)mbolode/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμβολο-δέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ τοῦ παραξονίου δεσμός</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:146" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.146</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
